### `{r} sR$headings$device_associated_infections`

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeIntroductionTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-device-associated.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeMethodsTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-device-associated.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table) && 
    sum(benchmark_data$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
  
  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table
  cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 25, has_reference = has_reference)

  ci_pattern <- ci_pattern_inline

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref"))

  ci_cols_to_drop <- character(0)
  if (!include_rate_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own")
  if (!include_pooled_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")
  if (!include_quartile_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop,
      "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
      "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
      "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")
  if (length(ci_cols_to_drop) > 0)
    tbl <- tbl |> dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(ci_cols_to_drop))

  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      dev = dplyr::recode_values(
        as.character(.data$dev),
        "cvc" ~ sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$cvc,
        "pvc" ~ sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$pvc,
        "vs" ~ sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$vs,
        "inv" ~ sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$inv,
        "niv" ~ sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$niv)) |>
    gt(rowname_col = "dev") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = cw$font_size,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = !(tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$n) | tidyselect::matches("^dev$")),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$grp_vc,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$cvc,
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$pvc)),
      id = "grp_vc") |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$grp_vs,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$vs,
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$inv,
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$niv)),
      id = "grp_vs") |>
    row_group_order(groups = c("grp_vc", "grp_vs")) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    )

  if (include_rate_ci && "ci_lower_own" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$rate, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own)
      )
  }
  if (include_pooled_ci && "ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_ref)
      )
  }
  if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    if (include_quartile_ci) {
      has_boot <- !is.na(tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower_ref"]])
      tbl <- tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        )
    } else {
      tbl <- tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
    }
  }

  # Add reference data spanner (only if reference data exists)
  if (has_reference) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate),
        sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(cw$pooled),
        sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(cw$q),
        sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(cw$q),
        sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(cw$q)
      )
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate)
      )
  }
  
  # Add footnotes
  tbl <- tbl |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n),
      placement = "right") |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate),
      placement = "right")
  
  # Add reference data footnotes if reference data exists
  if (has_reference) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = md(
          paste0(
            "$$\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate,
            "} = \\frac{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$n_dev_ass_inf,
            "}}{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$n_dev_days,
            "}} \\times ",
            format_integer(1000),
            "$$"
          )),
        locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "department_data"),
        placement = "right"
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled),
        placement = "right")
  }

  if (any(!is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sparse_note <- glue::glue(if (include_rate_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci, threshold = sparse_threshold)
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(
        footnote = sparse_note,
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = sR$table_headers$n,
          rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold),
        placement = "right")
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeOutlierInterpretation)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
  states <- metric_registry$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table
  if (has_outliers(states)) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(states, "dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table", sR, metric_registry)
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```
